title: re-folding and re-adopting change nothing the second time

assertions.detail: second fold stdout: [companion] Living-spec fold: todos already up to date (capabilities/todos/spec.md); no change.
no "loop did not close" backstop on an idempotent refold

commands.stdoutTail:

[companion] Living-spec fold: todos ← +1 added, ~0 modified, -0 removed, ↻0 renamed (capabilities/todos/spec.md)
[companion] Living-spec fold: todos already up to date (capabilities/todos/spec.md); no change.
[companion] Living-spec fold: todos already up to date (capabilities/todos/spec.md); no change.
